channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader? - DW.com
item.description:
1. Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?  DW.com

  4. New video appears to confirm US airstrike on IRGC base adjacent to Minab school  CNN
  5. Live updates: Pentagon identifies seventh US service member killed in Iran war  AP News

item.title: Five Iranian footballers 'in Australian safe house' after Asian Cup protest - BBC
item.description:
1. Five Iranian footballers 'in Australian safe house' after Asian Cup protest  BBC

item.title: US and Israel launch strikes across Iran as crowds celebrate new supreme leader - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US and Israel launch strikes across Iran as crowds celebrate new supreme leader  The Guardian

  4. Live updates: Trump calls choice of Iran’s leader a ‘big mistake’ as war roils global economy  CNN

item.title: Bahrain declares force majeure as Iran sets its only refinery ablaze - Euronews.com

item.title: A new Nepali party, led by an ex-rapper, is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election - NPR

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump says war with Iran could be ‘short-term excursion’ after Tehran mocks US operation - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Trump says war with Iran could be ‘short-term excursion’ after Tehran mocks US operation  The Guardian
  2. Live updates: Trump signals he will escalate war with Iran as Tehran apologises to neighbors for strikes  CNN
  3. Ready & Willing  Foundation for Defense of Democracies
  4. Trump vows to hit ‘very hard’ after Iran’s president says he won’t surrender  Politico
  5. Iran war updates: Trump vows hard strikes; Tehran says will not surrender  Al Jazeera
